name: Chicken Thighs in Honey-Sesame Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the honey, sesame seeds, ginger, cinnamon, cumin, paprika, turmeric, cayenne, lime juice, and olive oil.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken thighs and marinate, covered, overnight in the refrigerator.
4. When ready to cook, remove the chicken from the marinade.
5. Grill about 6 to 8 minutes on each side, being careful not to let the flames flare up.
6. If broiling, place on a greased baking sheet and cook 5 inches from the heat.
Yield: 6 servings
